entries.label: Version 1
entries.prompt: 现在生成缺失的项目产物。基于当前对话和项目上下文创建主要的可预览交付物；根据需求保存成简短的语义化文件名，例如 investor-pitch-deck.html、refund-dashboard.html 或 pricing-page.html。只有固定运行时约定或入口概览页才使用 index.html。把文件保存到当前项目中，并简要说明创建了哪些文件。

entries.label: Version 2
entries.prompt:
@impeccable-design-polish
当前目标：文件 · landing.html。
已选 skill：impeccable-design-polish。请把它作为本轮主要工作流。
全局资源索引：skills(162)、plugins(446)、MCP(0 enabled / 39 templates)、connectors(0 connected)、design files(11)。
可搜索 skills：8-bit-orbit-video-template, ad-creative, after-hours-editorial-template, agent-browser, ai-music-album, algorithmic-art, apple-hig, article-magazine, artifacts-builder, brainstorming, brand-extract, brand-guidelines, brandkit, industrial-brutalist-ui, canvas-design, card-twitter, card-xiaohongshu, chat-motion-overlay, color-expert, competitive-ads-extractor, copywriting, creative-director, d3-visualization, data-report, deck-guizang-editorial, deck-open-slide-canvas, deck-swiss-international, design-brief, design-consultation, design-md, design-review, digits-fintech-swiss-template, doc, doc-kami-parchment, docx, domain-name-brainstormer, ecommerce-image-workflow, editorial-burgundy-principles-template, emil-design-eng, emilkowalski-motion, enhance-prompt, export-download-debugging, fal-3d, fal-generate, fal-image-edit, fal-kling-o3, fal-lip-sync, fal-realtime, fal-restore, fal-train, fal-tryon, fal-upscale, fal-video-edit, fal-vision, faq-page, field-notes-editorial-template, figma-code-connect-components, figma-create-design-system-rules, figma-create-new-file, figma-generate-design，+102 more。
可搜索 plugins：3D Animated Boy Building Lego, 3D Stone Staircase Evolution Infographic, A Decade of Refinement Glow-Up, Agentic, Airbnb, Airtable, Ancient Guardian Dragon Rescue, Ancient Indian Kingdom FPV Video, Animation transfer and camera tracking prompt, Anime Martial Arts Battle Illustration, Ant, Apple, Application, Arc Browser, Art-Direct an Annual Report like a Magazine Creative Director, Artistic, Atelier Zero, Audio Jingle, Aurora Veil, BMW, BMW M, Beat-Synced Outfit Transformation Dance, Bento, Binance.US, Blog Post, Bold, Bold Poster Frame, Bold Signal Frame, Brief AI in Your Industry like a Tier-1 Consulting AI Vertical Lead, Brief a Health-System Board on Data Governance like a Chief Compliance Officer, Brutalism, Bugatti, Build Minimal Frame, Build a Buyer-Committee Leave-Behind like an Enterprise Sales Lead, Build a Designer Portfolio Narrative like a Hiring Bar-Raiser, Build a New-Hire Onboarding Module like a Top Enablement Lead, Build a Positioning & Messaging System like a Brand Strategist, Build a Studio Portfolio & Rate Deck like a Creative Studio Owner, Build an Editorial Design System like a Magazine Art Director, Cafe，+398 more。
可用 MCP：Higgsfield (OpenClaw) template, Pollinations template, Allyson (animated SVG) template, AWS Bedrock Image (Nova Canvas / SD 3.5) template, Prompt-to-Asset (icons / favicons / OG / logos) template, Nano Banana (AceDataCloud) template, Seedream (AceDataCloud) template, fal.ai (600+ models) template, Imagician (image post-processing) template, ImageSorcery (CV-based editing) template, Photopea (layered editor) template, Topaz Labs (AI upscale / denoise / sharpen) template, Transloadit (media pipelines) template, Screenshot Website (fast) template, ScreenshotOne (managed) template, Pagecast (browser → demo GIF / MP4) template, Figma Context (read designs → code) template, Design Token Bridge template, Design System Extractor (Storybook) template, figma-use (write designs from chat) template, Aesthetics Wiki (moodboard / inspiration) template, 21st.dev Magic (UI components) template, shadcn/ui template, FlyonUI (blocks & landing pages) template, AntV Chart template, Mermaid diagrams template, MCP Dashboards (45+ chart types) template, Excalidraw Architect (hand-drawn diagrams) template, EdgeOne Pages (publish HTML) template, PageDrop (instant HTML hosting) template, PDFSpark (HTML / URL → PDF) template, OGForge (Open Graph image generator) template, QRMint (styled QR codes) template, Slideshot (HTML → PDF / PNG / WebP / PPTX) template, Deckrun (Markdown → PDF / video / audio) template, Filesystem template, GitHub template, Fetch (HTTP) template, A11y (Web accessibility / WCAG) template。
可参考 design files：landing.html, dashboard.html, design-system.md, company-ops.html, ai-poster.html, app-shell.html, index.html, login.html, ai-chat.html, employees.html, workbook-shell.html。
流程规则：先定义审美目标和约束，再搜索/匹配资源；需要用户选择时生成结构化 question-form，并为有限选项保留可编辑的自定义答案，确认后继续执行。
请把这个设计打磨到可交付：检查视觉层级、排版、间距、响应式、按钮状态、空/加载/错误状态和可访问性，并直接完成最重要的修正。

entries.label: Version 3
entries.prompt: 从已停止或未完成的回合继续处理。先阅读当前对话、项目文件和可见错误，再执行下一个具体步骤。如果主产物已经存在，就在原文件上更新；否则创建缺失的主产物，并简要总结改了什么。
